summary: The Voice Live API provides real-time, bidirectional communication for voice-enabled applications using WebSocket connections. The API uses JSON-formatted events sent over WebSocket connections to manage conversations, audio streams, avatar interactions, and real-time responses. Events are categorized into client events (sent from client to server) and server events (sent from server to client).
